column1: # Deprecated code patterns and breaking changes
# This file lists deprecated code patterns (replace with newer alternatives)
# and breaking changes (migration notes). The checker scans the codebase
# for deprecations; breaking changes are shown as informational only.
# exclude_pattern: files matching this pattern will be excluded from results (multiple patterns separated by semicolon)

column4: deprecated in Mysql, use NOT ISNULL
for `$zz_page['breadcrumb_placeholder]`, removed; use full URL in placeholder
added a new key _package, take care for that
use wrap_setting_parse() + wrap_setting_list() instead, list() only if you need list values `[a, b, c]` parsed
use wrap_setting('url_placeholders'), values are lists not key/value pairs
No .po files inside `[module]/[module]` folder are included anymore, please move them to `[module]/languages`
Move `_path` definitions with brick to `routes.cfg`, merge with access groups from `access.cfg`, delete old path settings via `update.sql` and remove from `settings.cfg`
use internal redirect to other page, no more complicated setting of different paths for different domains here
removed, paths from routes; use wrap_path()
removed, paths from routes; use wrap_path()
removed, paths from routes; use wrap_path() or webpages.parameters route=
use wrap_path($area, $value, $settings) with keys check_rights and testing in $settings instead of 4th and 5th parameters
use wrap_path($area, $value, ['check_rights' => $bool]) instead of boolean as third parameter
use wrap_path($area, $value, ['detail' => '...']) instead of string as third parameter (e.g. access detail)
